description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is finished in a muted blue-gray color with white trim around the windows and doors, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front yard features a paved walkway flanked by manicured bushes and flowering shrubs, leading up to a covered entryway. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The rooftop includes a terrace area with railings and some outdoor furniture, suggesting a space for relaxation or gatherings. The property is bordered by landscaped greenery, enhancing its curb appeal and blending it into an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, blue-gray exterior, large windows, and landscaped front yard. Features a rooftop terrace and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, landscaped bushes, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, rooftop terrace, and extended landscaping on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, rooftop features, and a secondary outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible landscaping, side windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, flanked by bushes and a paved walkway, featuring a modern door and minimal overhang.
